title: i made friends with the second prettiest girl in my class GUI
description: This project adds GUI like New fonts, background and logos in the style of the anime called "i made friends with the second prettiest girl in my class"
body:
Introduction: This GUI-only resource pack is themed around the show "i made friends with the second prettiest girl in my class" You can use it with other resource packs by placing it on top.

## Hightlight

![Menu Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NKYq1nDY/images/27f9b61f98abb096e3d57b68f90fa1e66388725a.png)

**Additional Resources:**
- Check out more content on [My Website](https://serkan00900.github.io/Anime-packs/)
- Join our [Discord](https://serkan00900.github.io/Anime-packs/) server to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and join anime discussions.
Thank you for your support! ❤️

## Screenshots

![Menu Screen Windowed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NKYq1nDY/images/670b2bec3fc5d6897a6bd2aa5de59086d34dc4ff.png)
